name: Vapman Hard Case
summary: Keep your Vapman vaporiser and accessories protected wherever you go with the Vapman Hard Case.
description: Keep your Vapman vaporiser and accessories protected wherever you go with the Vapman Hard Case. Built with a rugged exterior and precision-moulded interior, this case ensures your setup stays secure, organised, and ready for any journey. The reinforced hard-shell exterior provides excellent impact resistance, while the custom foam interior keeps every Vapman component snug and protected. Designed to handle both short trips and long travels, it’s a dependable way to safeguard your vaporiser against knocks, scratches, and spills. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Durable hard-shell exterior with custom foam interior
